text: A R T I C L E  I N F O
evidence: ARTICLE INFO 是期刊文章元数据标记
suggested_rule: 检测全大写且含空格的 'ARTICLE INFO' 模式，移除该行及后续元数据块

text:
Article history:
Received 27 May 2023
Revised 15 September 2023
Accepted 11 October 2023
Available online 1 November 2023
evidence: 文章历史、收稿日期、修订日期、接受日期、在线日期等元数据
suggested_rule: 检测 'Article history:' 及后续日期行，移除整个元数据块

text: Keywords: digital twin, heritage building, conservation, BIM, point cloud

text:

text: © 2023 Elsevier Ltd. All rights reserved.

text: Check for updates

text: Publisher's note

text:

journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/jconbuild

text: doi: 10.1016/j.conbuildmat.2023.123456
evidence: DOI 号，元数据
suggested_rule: 检测 'doi:' 开头的行，移除
